## Common Issues

### Template preview not loading?
Make sure the template directory exists in `templates-preview/` and has an `index.html`.

### CSS changes not showing?
Run `cleancss -o css/styles.min.css css/styles.css` to rebuild the minified CSS.

### GitHub Pages not updating?
Check the Actions tab for build status. Pages deploy automatically after each push to `main`.
